title: EU Finalizes AI Act Implementation Guidelines for High-Risk Systems
summary: The European Union published detailed implementation guidelines for the AI Act, giving companies a clear roadmap for compliance with high-risk AI system requirements.

title: India Announces National AI Mission with Rs 10,000 Crore Budget
summary: The Indian government unveiled a comprehensive National AI Mission with a budget of Rs 10,000 crore aimed at establishing India as a global AI hub by 2030.

title: Anthropic Releases Claude Code with Autonomous Agent Capabilities
summary: Anthropic shipped Claude Code, an AI-powered coding tool that can autonomously write, test, and deploy code. Major upgrade over the previous iteration with improved context handling.

title: Product Managers Shifting to 'AI-First' Roadmapping — Survey of 500 PMs
summary: A new survey of 500 product managers reveals 73% are now using AI tools in their daily workflow, with roadmapping and user research seeing the highest adoption.

title: LinkedIn Carousel Posts See 4x Engagement vs Video for B2B Content
summary: New research shows LinkedIn carousel posts with 5-8 slides in the 'problem-solution' format are generating 4x more engagement than short-form video for B2B creators in 2025.

title: OpenAI Launches GPT-5 with Multimodal Reasoning and Extended Context
summary: OpenAI officially released GPT-5, featuring a 200k token context window, native multimodal input, and significantly improved reasoning benchmarks over GPT-4o.

title: Responsible AI Coalition Publishes Deepfake Detection Standards
summary: A coalition of major tech firms and academic institutions published the first industry-wide standards for deepfake detection, establishing a watermarking framework for AI-generated media.

title: Zomato Reports Record Q3 with 40% Revenue Growth, Eyes Southeast Asia
summary: Zomato posted its best quarter ever with Rs 4,800 crore revenue, a 40% YoY jump, and announced plans to expand into Thailand and Vietnam in FY26.

title: Show HN: I built an AI PM that writes PRDs from voice memos
summary: Built this after getting tired of context-switching between voice notes and Notion. Records your voice, transcribes, extracts user stories, and formats a full PRD.

title: Instagram Algorithm Update Favors 'Story-First' Reels — Creator Report
summary: Creators are reporting a significant reach boost from Reels that start with a story hook in the first 3 seconds before showing the 'value drop'. Hook formats matter more than ever.

title: Cursor AI Editor Raises $100M Series B, Crosses 1M Daily Active Users
summary: Cursor announced a $100M Series B at a $1B valuation, citing 1 million daily active developers. Plans to expand enterprise features and launch a team collaboration mode.

title: r/ProductManagement: How are you using AI for user research? Megathread
summary: Top responses include using Claude for qualitative interview synthesis, Dovetail AI for pattern recognition across 100+ user interviews, and custom GPTs for competitive analysis.

title: India Passes Digital Personal Data Protection Rules — Key Provisions Explained
summary: India's Ministry of Electronics published the final DPDP rules, mandating data localization for sensitive data, consent frameworks for minors, and a 72-hour breach notification window.

title: UN Adopts First Global AI Safety Resolution — What It Means
summary: The UN General Assembly adopted a landmark resolution on AI safety, calling for international cooperation on risk assessment and establishing an advisory body on AI governance.

title: Twitter X Algorithm Boosting 'Thread + Carousel' Hybrid Posts in March
summary: Data from 10,000 creator accounts shows Twitter/X is giving outsized reach to posts that combine a short thread (3-5 tweets) with an embedded image carousel. Engagement rate up 60%.
